response_text:
ENTITY Client
PK client_code
ATTR client_code : integer : PK
ATTR client_name : varchar

ENTITY ProductionOrder
PK order_code
ATTR order_code : integer : PK
ATTR registration_date : date

ENTITY Material
PK material_code
ATTR material_code : integer : PK
ATTR material_description : varchar

ENTITY OperationType
PK operation_type_code
ATTR operation_type_code : integer : PK
ATTR operation_type_description : varchar

ENTITY WorkCenter
PK work_center_code
ATTR work_center_code : integer : PK

ENTITY OperationExecution
PK execution_code
ATTR execution_code : integer : PK
ATTR start_datetime : timestamp
ATTR quantity : float

REL OperationExecution -> Client : 1 -> 0..N : FK=client_code
REL OperationExecution -> ProductionOrder : 1 -> 0..N : FK=order_code
REL OperationExecution -> Material : 1 -> 0..N : FK=material_code
REL OperationExecution -> OperationType : 1 -> 0..N : FK=operation_type_code
REL OperationExecution -> WorkCenter : 1 -> 0..N : FK=work_center_code
